case_title: GOLD COAST EXPRESS VS CABELLO ALDO DBA COLLEGE SERVICE CENTER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,750.00 FILED BY GOLD COAST EXPRESS AS TO DEFENDANT CABELLO ALDO DBA COLLEGE SERVICE CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
INVALID SERVICE AS TO ALDO CABELLO, NO MAILING ON SUBSERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-02-1993, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO FEB-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLD COAST EXPRESS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CABELLO ALDO DBA COLLEGE SERVICE CENTER $3,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,765.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-02-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00 TRIAL OF OCT-28-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
INVALID, NO TIME AND DATE GIVEN FOR SERVICE.
